examples: how do I reset my password
responses: Of course — you can reset your password by clicking 'Forgot Password' on the login page and following the instructions sent to your email.
Thanks for reaching out. Please use the 'Forgot Password' option on the login page to reset your password.
I'd be happy to help. You can reset your password from the login page using the 'Forgot Password' link.

examples: it won't let me log in
responses: I'm sorry you're having trouble logging in. Are you having a password issue, seeing an error message, or is your account locked?
Thanks for letting me know. Could you clarify whether this is a password problem, a lockout issue, or an error on the login page?
I understand the login issue is frustrating. Can you tell me whether you forgot your password, saw an error, or think your account is locked?

examples: it says my account is blocked
I can't get in because my account is locked
responses: I'm sorry about that. It looks like your account may be locked. Did you receive any error message or security alert?
Thanks for reporting this. If your account is locked, could you let me know whether you saw a warning or security notice?
I understand this is inconvenient. Please tell me whether you received any error message when trying to sign in.

examples: why is my payment not going through
responses: I'm sorry your payment didn't go through. This may require account-specific investigation, so I'll escalate it to a support specialist.
Thanks for letting us know. Since this is a payment issue, I'll escalate it for further review.
I understand how frustrating payment problems can be. This issue should be reviewed by a human support specialist.

examples: why did you charge me again
responses: I'm sorry about the duplicate charge. This issue needs to be reviewed by a support specialist, so I'll escalate it right away.
Thanks for reporting this. A duplicate charge should be investigated, so I'm escalating it to a human agent.
I understand your concern. Since this may involve duplicate billing, I'll pass it to a support specialist for review.

examples: how do I get a refund
can I get my money back
responses: I'm sorry for the inconvenience. You can request a refund from your account dashboard or the support section, depending on your purchase type.
Thanks for reaching out. You can start a refund request from your account dashboard or support page.
I understand you'd like a refund. Please go to your account dashboard and submit a refund request there.
I'd be happy to help with billing. Could you clarify whether this is about an invoice, a subscription fee, or an unexpected charge?
Thanks for your message. Please let me know if your billing question is about an invoice, a plan cost, or a charge you don't recognize.
I understand billing issues can be confusing. Can you tell me whether this is about an invoice, subscription, or unexpected payment?

examples: I want to cancel my subscription
responses: You can cancel your subscription from the billing or subscription section in your account settings.
Of course — to cancel your subscription, please go to the billing or subscription settings in your account.
Thanks for reaching out. You can manage or cancel your subscription from your account settings.

examples: my account was used without permission
responses: I'm sorry to hear that. This may involve fraudulent activity, so I'm escalating it immediately to a support specialist.
Thanks for reporting this right away. Because this may be fraud-related, it needs urgent review by a human agent.
I understand your concern. This issue appears security-related, so I'll escalate it immediately.
You can check your order status from the orders section in your account dashboard.
Thanks for reaching out. Please open your account dashboard and go to the orders section to track your order.
Of course — your order status should be available in the orders area of your account.

responses: I'm sorry about the delivery problem. Could you clarify whether your order is delayed, missing, or marked as delivered but not received?
Thanks for letting me know. Please tell me whether the package is late, missing, or incorrectly marked as delivered.
I understand this is frustrating. Can you clarify if the issue is a delay, a missing package, or a delivery status problem?
